account.download.intro1: The Lightship AR Developer Kit (ARDK) and Lightship Maps (Maps SDK) are built to work with iOS, Android, and Unity. For the best experience, please ensure your development environment meets the minimum system requirements. An API license key is required for Maps SDK and certain ARDK features.

account.launch_types.intro: The following outlines the various launch types lightship supports, this is to provide you as a lightship developer a better understanding of the maturity of a given offering. These are general guidelines and if you have a use case/application that you’d like to build before a product or service is generally available, we encourage you to reach out and we will work with you to determine how best to support you. Experimental and Beta features are subject to limitations set out on this page, as well as in feature documentation and the Lightship Terms of Service.
account.launch_types.intro_structured: The following outlines the various launch types lightship supports, this is to provide you as a lightship developer a better understanding of the maturity of a given offering.  These are general guidelines and if you have a use case/application that you’d like to build before a product or service is generally available, we encourage you to reach out and we will work with you to determine how best to support you. Experimental and Beta features are subject to limitations set out on this page, as well as in feature documentation and the <1>Lightship Terms of Service</1>.
account.launch_types.experimental.intro: In order to speed up our feedback loop we will start shipping experimental features within ARDK. This will allow developers to test some of our latest features and give feedback before we lock them down. Experimental features should not be used in production products as they are not supported and are subject to breaking changes, and may be deprecated without notice.
account.launch_types.general_availabilit: General Availability products and features are open to all customers, ready for production use, and covered by the associated SLAs, where applicable. Niantic typically supports General Availability products and features through APIs, SDKs, and the Lightship developer portal, except in unusual circumstances where providing one or more of the foregoing capabilities is unreasonable in the context of the particular product or feature.
account.launch_types.private_beta.intro: Early access features are limited to a closed group of testers for a limited subset of launches. Participation is by invitation only and may be subject to additional terms These features may be unstable, change in backward-incompatible ways, and are not guaranteed to be released. There are no Service Level Agreements (SLAs) provided and no technical support obligations. Early access releases focus on validating product prototypes, features and products.Applications that make use of certain features and services in Private Beta may require pre-approval before release.
account.launch_types.public_beta.intro: At public beta, products or features are ready for broader customer testing and use. Betas are often publicly announced. There are no SLAs or technical support obligations in a beta release unless otherwise specified in product terms or the terms of a particular beta program. Customers are not billed for their usage of Public Beta services or products.  While public previews are likely to become generally available there is no obligation to release to General Availability (GA). If and when the service moves to GA, we will advise Public Beta customers on how to migrate to the GA service.

signin.create_account.values.1.descripti: Niantic Lightship Augmented Reality Developer Kit (ARDK) gives developers the same AR and mapping tools used to power some of Niantic's most popular games including Pokémon Go, Pikmin Bloom, Ingress, and more.
signin.create_account.values.2.descripti: Niantic Lightship ARDK is designed for both Android and iOS mobile platforms and integrates with Unity.
signin.create_account.values.3.descripti: Lightship ARDK is currently free to download including features like Depth, Occlusion, Semantic Segmentation, and Real-time Meshing. Pricing is subject to change.
Lightship ARDK is currently free to download including features like Depth, Occlusion, Semantic Segmentation, and Real-time Meshing. <1>Pricing is subject to change</1>.
